name: Measure CCD Dark Current Rate
description: Calculate the dark current rate (in e-/pix/sec) of the Palomar LFC CCD using the bias frames in ~/AstroImages/dark_current/bias/ and dark frames in ~/AstroImages/dark_current/dark/. Create a median-combined Master Bias and a median-combined Master Dark, saving them to ~/AstroImages/dark_current/results/master_bias.fits and ~/AstroImages/dark_current/results/master_dark.fits respectively. Extract the exposure time from the FITS headers and calculate the dark current rate using the formula: Rate = ((MASTER_DARK_MEDIAN - MASTER_BIAS_MEDIAN) * 2.0) / EXPOSURE_TIME (assuming a detector gain of 2.0 e-/ADU). Create a report at ~/AstroImages/dark_current/results/dark_rate_report.txt containing the labeled values for MASTER_BIAS_MEDIAN, MASTER_DARK_MEDIAN, EXPOSURE_TIME, and DARK_CURRENT_RATE.

metadata.data_source: Palomar 200-inch Hale Telescope, Large Format Camera (LFC)
